name: Quantum Metric Digital Analytics API
what_it_does: Enterprise digital analytics and session intelligence platform with REST API — capturing all user interactions at the session level, enabling teams to query behavioral data to understand conversion drops, correlate technical errors with user frustration, analyze revenue impact of UX issues, and share session replays for cross-team collaboration.
use_cases: Querying session data and behavioral patterns for UX investigation workflows
Integrating Quantum Metric anomaly alerts with incident management for revenue impact triage
Pulling conversion funnel analytics for product team prioritization dashboards
Analyzing session replay segments for specific error states or frustration signals
Correlating technical performance metrics with user experience outcomes via API
not_for: Lightweight heatmaps and simple session replay (use Hotjar or Mouseflow)
Product analytics for feature usage tracking (use Amplitude or Mixpanel)
Mobile app debugging and crash reporting (use Instabug or Sentry)
best_when: An enterprise digital team (ecommerce, banking, travel) wants to understand the revenue impact of UX friction, correlate technical errors with user behavior, and enable cross-functional teams to access behavioral data without analyst bottlenecks.
avoid_when: You need lightweight heatmaps, mobile app analytics, or simple user onboarding flows — Quantum Metric is enterprise-scale with corresponding pricing.

auth.notes: API key from Quantum Metric account. Bearer token auth. Organization-scoped access with site-level segmentation. JavaScript SDK for session data capture. Webhook for anomaly and alert events. No OAuth2. Enterprise SSO integration. Salesforce and data warehouse integrations.

pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise pricing based on sessions/month; contact sales
pricing.notes: Colorado Springs-based company. Founded 2015. Raised $200M+ (Unicorn). Backed by Insight Partners, Bain Capital. Continuous Product Design (CPD) methodology differentiator. Revenue impact attribution from UX issues. Anomaly detection alerts revenue drops. Session ID for cross-team sharing. Strong in Fortune 500 retail, banking, and travel enterprises.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for sessions, events, metrics, and anomalies. Bearer token auth. Moderate documentation for enterprise integrations. JavaScript SDK required for session capture. API queries behavioral data post-capture. Anomaly alerts via webhook. Enterprise integration via data warehouse export available.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Session reads fully idempotent. Metric reads idempotent by period. Anomaly reads idempotent. Segment reads idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: JavaScript SDK required — session capture must be configured on all pages
PII in sessions requires masking configuration — financial and health apps especially
Enterprise pricing significant — validate ROI against session volume before commit
Anomaly detection requires baseline period to calibrate
Data warehouse export for bulk analytics — API for operational queries

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, PCI-DSS compliant. US and EU data residency. Bearer token auth. Session replay captures all user interactions — implement comprehensive PII masking. Financial transaction data requires PCI-DSS scope review. Enterprise SSO recommended for team access. Unicorn company with investor security standards.
